testcase.name: test_custom_image_result_io_exception_is_redacted_and_diagnostic[b64_json]
testcase.failure: tests/tools/test_provider_boundary_adversarial.py:790: in test_custom_image_result_io_exception_is_redacted_and_diagnostic result = provider.generate( agent/custom_image_providers.py:749: in generate path = save_b64_image(b64, prefix=prefix) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/tools/test_provider_boundary_adversarial.py:763: in fail_result_io raise RuntimeError(f"{secret} {endpoint}") E RuntimeError: SENTINEL-CUSTOM-RESULT-SECRET-DO-NOT-LEAK https://sentinel-custom-result.example.test/private
